_comment_name: Give your strategy a short, descriptive name.
name: My Custom Strategy
_comment_description: One sentence: what is your thesis? What market condition are you betting on?
description: A starting desk with risk management, on-chain intelligence, and trend-following execution.
_comment_agents: List agents to hire. Risk manager is always first. Browse skills/ for available agents, or create your own in skills/your-agent-name/SKILL.md.
_comment_risk_parameters: These limits apply to ALL agents on the desk. The Risk Manager enforces them.

risk_parameters._comment_max_position: Max percentage of portfolio in any single position. Conservative: 5, Moderate: 10, Aggressive: 20.
risk_parameters._comment_max_drawdown: If portfolio drops by this percentage, all trading stops. Conservative: 10, Moderate: 15, Aggressive: 25.
risk_parameters._comment_max_leverage: Maximum leverage allowed. Set to 1 for no leverage.
risk_parameters._comment_stop_loss: Require a stop-loss on every trade. Always keep this true.
risk_parameters._comment_correlation: Max percentage of portfolio in correlated assets (correlation > 0.7).

_comment_strategy_config: Add strategy-specific settings below. This section varies by strategy — add whatever your agents need.
